TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nqwaq (ke' na Plmukan: 嘴 ) ga spiyang balay qbuci hi' / hi na kneril ru mlikuy. qutux hi' ga qutux nqwaq ta. cyux maki' te kyahu' nguhuw qu nqwaq na squliq. mhtuw su tanux ga blaq smi sabuw nqwaq. (Te Ciwal qmalan mlahang inbu na Punu) == kinhulan s'utu biru ==
S.PHON: nqwaq (keʔ na plmukan: * ) ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ βalaj qβuʦ~ʨi ħiʔ / ħi na kneril ru mlikuj. qutux ħiʔ ɣa qutux nqwaq ta. ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ te kjaħuʔ ŋuħuw qu nqwaq na s~ɕquliq. mħtuw s~ɕu tanux ɣa βlaq s~ɕmi s~ɕaβuw nqwaq. (te ʦ~ʨiwal qmalan mlaħaŋ inβu na punu) == kinħulan s~ɕʔutu βiru ==
S.FORM: nqwaq (ke' na Plmukan: 嘴 ) ga spiyang balay qbuci hi' / hi na kneril ru mlikuy. qutux hi' ga qutux nqwaq ta. cyux maki' te kyahu' nguhuw qu nqwaq na squliq. mhtuw su tanux ga blaq smi sabuw nqwaq. (Te Ciwal qmalan mlahang inbu na Punu) == kinhulan s'utu biru ==
S.PHON: nqwaq (keʔ na plmukan: * ) ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ βalaj qβuʦ~ʨi ħiʔ / ħi na kneril ru mlikuj. qutux ħiʔ ɣa qutux nqwaq ta. ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ te kjaħuʔ ŋuħuw qu nqwaq na s~ɕquliq. mħtuw s~ɕu tanux ɣa βlaq s~ɕmi s~ɕaβuw nqwaq. (te ʦ~ʨiwal qmalan mlaħaŋ inβu na punu) == kinħulan s~ɕʔutu βiru ==
